Advanced Slow Top.name: Advanced Slow Top
Advanced Slow Top.description: Deal 112% damage to a small area of enemies, with a 100% chance to apply a speed reduction effect for two turns.

Advanced Theft.name: Advanced Theft
Advanced Theft.description: Deal 80% damage to a small area of enemies and steal 300 BP from the target to replenish the owner.

Heartwarming Peak.name: Heartwarming Peak
Heartwarming Peak.description: Deal 40% damage to a small area of enemies and reduce their mobility by 6%.
